data.title: Psylutions dominates Colorado's regulated psychedelic market by supplying products to over half of licensed healing centers.
data.description: In Colorado, the inaugural psilocybin cultivator and manufacturer, Psylutions, is now supplying scientifically approved products to over 50% of the state's licensed healing centers. This significant milestone was reached on December 12, 2025 in Denver.
Markets watch the Fed closely: a 25 bps cut is expected, likely hawkish, keeping the focus on incoming data and economic signals.

data.title: Founder and top shareholder of lululemon expresses concern over board's failure in succession planning. Will engage actively to unlock value for shareholders.
data.description: Chip Wilson, the founder of lululemon and the company's largest active shareholder, is expressing deep concerns about the board's failure at succession planning. Wilson intends to stay engaged with lululemon in order to unlock value for all shareholders. This announcement was made in Vancouver, BC on December 12, 2025.

data.title: Zelluna completes first GMP batch of ZI-MA4-1, a TCR-NK cell therapy for cancer. Major step towards clinical trial. Milestone reached.
data.description: In Oslo, Norway, Zelluna (stock ticker: ZLNA) revealed today the completion of the initial production and quality control assessment of the premier Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) group of their primary therapy, ZI-MA4-1. This development signifies a significant advancement for the company in the domain of allogeneic “off-the-shelf” T Cell Receptor-based Natural Killer (TCR-NK) cell treatments aimed at cancer. The material has been crafted for utilization in Zelluna’s impending inaugural human clinical exploration. This achievement marks a pivotal stage in Zelluna's journey towards official submission for regulatory approval and the commencement of patient treatment.
BoJ is said to be no closer to pinpointing the neutral rate
BoJ is said to see hiking cycle likely extending beyond 0.75%

data.title: Smiths Detection's SDX 100100 DV HC X-ray scanner added to TSA Air Cargo Screening Technology List for US air cargo sector.
data.description: Smiths Detection, a prominent player in security screening tech, revealed that its SDX 100100 DV HC X-ray scanner is now included in the Transportation Security Administration’s Air Cargo Screening Technology List (ACSTL). This approval allows regulated operators in the US air cargo industry to utilize the system. The dual-view scanner meets stringent TSA standards for air cargo screening, marking a significant development for the sector.

data.title: CommLoan secures $200M financing for Dr. Kali P. Chaudhuri's Hollywood Park hotel, first approved in LA's 300-acre project.
data.description: A commercial real estate lender utilizing technology has arranged intricate financing for Dr. Kali P. Chaudhuri's primary hotel property. This hotel is the sole approved accommodation within a 300-acre Hollywood Park development in Los Angeles. The transaction took place in Scottsdale, Arizona on December 12, 2025. The lender, CommLoan, specializes in commercial real estate lending.

data.title: Ellomay awarded tender for 20 MW solar project in Italy's Piemonte region. 80% tariff secured using non-Chinese components.
data.description: Ellomay Capital Ltd., a renewable energy company operating in Europe, Israel, and the USA, announced that its subsidiary, Ellomay Solar Italy Fourteen S.r.l., has been awarded a tariff in Italy’s Transitional FER X “NZIA” national competitive tender. This tariff, designed for solar projects using non-Chinese components, secures support for 80% of the capacity of Ellomay 14, a Ready-to-Build solar project located in the Piemonte Region in Italy. This Italian project company, wholly owned by Ellomay Capital Ltd., aims to develop renewable energy projects efficiently.

data.title: Ryder System, Inc. Chairman & CEO Robert E. Sanchez to retire on March 31, 2026. COO John J. Diez, 54, to take CEO role.
data.description: Ryder System, Inc. announced that Chairman and CEO Robert E. Sanchez, aged 60, will retire on March 31, 2026. The company’s board of directors approved a succession plan, appointing President and COO John J. Diez, aged 54, as the new CEO of the logistics and transportation company. Diez will take on the role from March 31, 2026, and has been elected to the board of directors. Ryder System, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol R.

data.title: NXG Cushing® Midstream Energy Fund (NYSE: SRV) disclosed the preliminary outcome of its rights offering that ran from Nov 17 to Dec 11, 2025.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, the NXG Cushing® Midstream Energy Fund (NYSE: SRV) revealed the initial outcomes of its transferable rights offering known as the Offer. This Offer began on November 17, 2025, and concluded on December 11, 2025 (The Expiration Date).

data.title: Caleres (NYSE: CAL) declares $0.07 quarterly dividend, payable on Jan. 9, 2026, to shareholders of record as of Dec. 26, 2025.
data.description: In St. Louis, footwear company Caleres (NYSE: CAL) revealed its Board of Directors has approved a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.07 per share. The dividend will be distributed on January 9, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of December 26, 2025. Maintaining a tradition of over a century, Caleres persistently issues quarterly dividends, showcasing its dedication to shareholders and financial stability. Caleres, a notable collection of consumer-focused footwear brands, emphasizes its commitment to providing consistent returns to its investors.
